sn56.117-119:0.3: Dying in Hell and Reborn as Gods
sn56.117-119:1.1: … "So too, bhikkhus, those beings are few who, when they pass away from hell, are reborn among the devas. But those beings are more numerous who, when they pass away from hell, are reborn in hell … in the animal realm … in the domain of ghosts. … "
